positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mystical forest portal opening, rendered in the negative space style. The scene features interlocking geometric patterns, bioluminescent flora, and ethereal floating particles surrounding a central, glowing archway. The color palette uses deep indigo, emerald green, and vibrant cyan accents against a stark black background. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and crisp lines. The composition must be highly detailed and perfect for repeating pattern textile art. Vector art aesthetic, detailed linework, high contrast, mystic, whimsical, symmetrical, flat lay style, digital illustration, forest portal.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, logo, poor anatomy, low detail, grunge, photo, grainy, artifact, jpeg artifacts, asymmetrical, muted colors
